text:
I tried over 10 Nigerian banking and fintech Apps including Paga, GT, One Bank, PiggyVest, Carbon etc to open a new Bank account.

They all didn’t work because a Nigerian phone number is required to open an account. This isn’t a KYC requirement and can be simply fixed by integrating Twilio or Vonage for SMS/WhatsApp to non-Nigerian numbers, if you must use Phone number for authentication.

Only App that worked was ALAT by Wema. With my BVN and NIN, I could set up an account and I have tier 3 account after BVN, NIN and address verification.

There’s still a huge opportunity for a Fintech App that provides Nigerian banking for Nigerians abroad.
